name: goldilocks-app
description: React web app with embedded pi agent for DFT input file generation

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @goldilocks/contracts && npm run build -w @goldilocks/config && npm run build -w @goldilocks/data && npm run build -w @goldilocks/runtime
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @goldilocks/gateway && npm run build -w @goldilocks/agent-service && npm run build -w @goldilocks/frontend
scripts.dev:shared: concurrently "npm run dev -w @goldilocks/contracts" "npm run dev -w @goldilocks/config" "npm run dev -w @goldilocks/data" "npm run dev -w @goldilocks/runtime"
scripts.dev:agent-service-stack: npm run build:packages && concurrently "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev -w @goldilocks/agent-service"
scripts.dev:web-stack: concurrently "npm run dev:shared" "PORT=3000 npm run dev -w @goldilocks/gateway" "npm run dev -w @goldilocks/frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:packages && npm run dev:web-stack
scripts.dev:both: npm run build:packages && concurrently "npm run dev -w @goldilocks/contracts" "npm run dev -w @goldilocks/config" "npm run dev -w @goldilocks/data" "npm run dev -w @goldilocks/runtime" "PORT=3000 npm run dev -w @goldilocks/gateway" "npm run dev -w @goldilocks/agent-service" "npm run dev -w @goldilocks/frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @goldilocks/contracts && npm run lint -w @goldilocks/config && npm run lint -w @goldilocks/data && npm run lint -w @goldilocks/runtime && npm run lint -w @goldilocks/gateway && npm run lint -w @goldilocks/agent-service && npm run lint -w @goldilocks/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @goldilocks/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @goldilocks/config && npm run typecheck -w @goldilocks/data && npm run typecheck -w @goldilocks/runtime && npm run typecheck -w @goldilocks/gateway && npm run typecheck -w @goldilocks/agent-service && npm run typecheck -w @goldilocks/frontend
